system.powerDescription:
You concentrate your grace into a single part of your body (finger, tongue, eye, etc) which then detaches from your form as a relic. The relic is considered an object, you may not control it, and you take any stress/damage in its stead. You may suffer penalties appropriate for the part whilst it is separated. 

As part of an action you may undergo communion. Your body appears to perish and then vanish, rapidly regenerating from the relic along with any equipment you had on your person. When this power ends the part appears back on your body.
